title: Spit Splat
description: Spit Splat is a cute tameable mob that will spit on you at the slightest opportunity !
body:
## THIS MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB

![Spit Splat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cb94bcd92d8b3b794c32d15c5d3741c27308587.png)
![Spit Splat GIF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/223d3c6ca79b91b362cdc4ae1ab36da61025a4e6.gif)

You will find him floating above the oceans (except frozen oceans), he is aggressive when he sees a player but does not attack in close combat. Instead, he'll spit a bubble at you.

 ![Spit on ya](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/209ea8c21ad9d40c940d776da8d866a2c09b7731.png)

This bubble will give you a new potion effect, the bubble trap. You will not take damage but will be stuck in a bubble, slowly floating upwards before popping as you fall.

**Spit Splat is tameable with some kelp** (if you can approach him quickly enough !) and will become in turret mode when you right click on him, defending the area and floating without moving.

By killing a few Spit Splats, you will obtain a raw Spit Splat but also scales.
The raw Spit Splat gives you the bubble effect for 2 seconds, allowing you to use it in climbing situations, to return to the surface of an ocean or to craft potions.
While the cooked Spit Splat gives you the bubble effect, but also the slow falling effect when the bubble pop. Allowing you to reach the ground without taking any damage.

![Splat Food](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f73f35a9808e02d64d015f66d5fccb379a8a5621.png)

The scales are used to craft two weapons and some bubble potions/arrow :

![Bubble Potions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52838464e69c187ec2848a209247a62a5fb6cc3d.png)

![The Splatter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff3bde0441b79fe5599c2b4dc16f1d30c019031c.png)

It's a weapon that is not very offensive but allows you to shoot a bubble at your enemies from a long distance.

![Splatter GIF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95510d8d5b6f3f3d64978fa167a203dd2978676f.gif)

![The Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27132ca43769297819f536fe5b5bc71272321e56.png)

The Splat totem, a totem that doesn't look powerful but contains the power of the Spit Splat, raising a wave around you and giving you the conduit power effect for 1 minute, the wave extinguishes the fire from you and your pets while putting the monsters in a bubble for 4 seconds.
The totem can be used 50 times before breaking and its cooldown is 3 minutes.

![Crafting Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7188aa5251f8c639fbee0248a3bf1cef8c355f7a.png)

The Splatter

![Splatter Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a63a46fc4c003e88d8f618f94ce195fd7b0b73e3.png)

Splat Totem

![Totem Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d28b2ad0bf02e918042ebc80c46542d3952d8b2.png)

Bubble Potions

![Bubble Potions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adfb8f4dee325e3b4c1e8864126e7719f7b87cbb.png)

Roadmap :

 - A new Splat with a pirhana-like style, more agressive and with a new weapon
 - A new Splat with a shark-like style, faster and with a new armor set 
 - A new Splat with a whale-like style, with some unique boss mechanic
